title: rhus glabra var. cismontana
intro: Rhus glabra var. cismontana, also known as the California sumac or smooth sumac, is a variety of the smooth sumac plant that is native to California. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rhus glabra var. cismontana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
